evals.prompt: Run /f5-ultravisionplan in pilot mode on this repo. Reconstruct the full vision, audit the current state, and generate the .UltraVision plan with calibration task shards.
evals.expected_output: .UltraVision/ folder with all 10 root docs, per-module tasklists with _MODULE.md charters, schema-valid tasks (IDs, complexity, lane, milestone, done-when, gates), media tasks flagged paid for a visual product, and a clean validator run reflected in INDEX.md
files: toy game repo with ambitious README vision, TODO comments, no sma.gen3.json

evals.prompt: this project needs the full treatment — map every single task between what we have now and the perfect finished product, ready for my SMA agents to execute in parallel
evals.expected_output: Full-mode .UltraVision plan: exhaustive gap-covering tasklists grouped by module ownership, shared-hot-path serialization, complexity distribution suitable for model delegation, validator PASS

evals.prompt: We finished a bunch of UltraVision tasks last sprint and added a new payments module — refresh the plan.
evals.expected_output: Refresh mode: completed tasks flipped with evidence preserved, new module directory with new task IDs appended (no renumbering), regenerated stats and INDEX
